title: Caruncularia serrulata
taxonomy: Caruncularia serrulata is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. The classification of Caruncularia serrulata places it within the order Asterales. It is a type of daisy or composite flower, characterized by its yellow petals and dark centers. Within the Asteraceae family, Caruncularia serrulata is part of the subfamily Asteroideae. The classification of Caruncularia serrulata is still being studied and refined by botanists.
